name: Brussels Sprouts with Walnuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the Brussels sprouts in half and steam until tender.
2. In a separate pan, sauté the walnuts in the margarine until they are golden brown.
3. Pour the sautéed walnuts over the steamed Brussels sprouts in a serving dish.
4. Sprinkle the ground nutmeg over the top.
1/4 recipe - 100 calories, 1 vegetable exchange, 1 1/2 fat (6 grams), carbohydrate (4 grams), protein (8 grams) fat (44 mg sodium), potassium (27 mg), cholesterol (0)
Source: Am. Diabetes Assoc. Holiday Cookbook by Betty Wedman 1986
Shared but not tested by Elizabeth Rodier, Nov 93
